channel.title: Gary Talbot Updates
channel.description: Build notes, project updates, and public experiments from Gary Talbot.

item.title: Version 0.8: added click-through proof
item.description: Added a selected-work proof section with public links, a stronger inquiry path, and clearer receipts for why hiring Gary is less of a leap.

item.title: Version 0.5: the site got stranger
item.description: The front page was rebuilt into a louder, more opinionated v0.5 with a custom layout, stronger atmosphere, and a front-door voice that feels more like Gary and less like polished template furniture.

item.title: Made the site properly shippable
item.description: Split shared CSS into assets, added favicon, web manifest, custom 404 page, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and deployment config so the site could move from draft toy to public artifact.

item.title: Initial launch and public repo
item.description: Initialized git, created the public repository, and pushed the first live version of GaryTalbot.site so the project had both a home page and visible source.
